title: EscrowNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-escrow-rs (Solana escrow validation + settlement events).

$dd:nats.summary: Solana escrow validation and result subjects.

subjects.name: EscrowSolanaValidate
subjects.description: Validation requests for solana.escrow.v1 intents. Default for ESCROW_VALIDATE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.escrow.solana.validate

subjects.name: EscrowSolanaResults
subjects.description: Published escrow validation results. Default for ESCROW_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.escrow.solana.results
